headline: TOD Near MRT Stations Delivers Only Luxury Not Affordability
context: Only 12 of 31 MRT Putrajaya Line stations have significant transit-oriented development within 400 metres.

cards.big: Only 12 of 31 MRT Putrajaya stations have TOD within 400 metres
cards.sub: TOD promised as key benefit but most stations surrounded by low-density areas

cards.big: Land within 400m commands 35% premium but affordable housing absent
cards.sub: None of the 12 TOD zones include housing below RM400,000

cards.big: DBKL approved 4 TOD projects totalling RM18 billion near 4 MRT stations
cards.sub: All 4 feature luxury condos and commercial space with zero affordable units

cards.big: Hong Kong MTR earns 40% revenue from TOD but Malaysian model fails
cards.sub: MRT Corp has no property development mandate limiting value capture

cards.big: TOD delivery tests whether transit investment creates accessible or exclusive neighbourhoods
TOD near MRT delivers luxury units, not affordability. Zoning policy, not market forces, determines who benefits.
